title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. fragile
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. fragile, a rare and lesser-known species of plant, is a type of hawkweed, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. fragile include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
